variants.title: HiFi Filter SAL 150280125CV Complete Air Filter
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SAL 150280125CV Complete Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAL 150280125CV Complete Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SAL 150280125CV is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: COMPLETE AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 276.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 150.0 mm, Thread 1 (D7): M8X1,25, Height 1 (H1): 178.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 163.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 156.0 mm
